_comment: Claude Code project settings. The PreToolUse hook blocks obviously dangerous or secret-exposing bash before it runs. Hook input arrives as JSON on stdin; we grep the raw payload so it works regardless of the exact schema. If a future Claude Code version changes hook wiring, confirm against the current hooks docs.

hooks.command: payload=$(cat); if echo "$payload" | grep -qiE 'rm -rf (/|~|\.\.)|:(){ :|:& };:|cat[^|]*\.env|git add[^&|]*\.env|(PRIVATE_KEY|MNEMONIC|SEED_PHRASE)=|>[[:space:]]*\.env'; then echo 'BLOCKED by guard: command touches secrets or is destructive. Review it yourself before running.'; exit 1; fi; exit 0
